title: Welcome Text
description: Display personalized welcome messages in chat and much more every time a player joins your server.
body:
This plugin welcomes players when they join the server.

You need **PlaceHolderAPI** if you want information variables

You can view the statistics of this plugin on: [bStats - WelcomeText](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/WelcomeText/26740)

If you encounter a problem or would like to request a new feature, please open an issue here: [Issue Tracker](https://gitlab.com/AlienDenis12/welcome-text/-/boards)

**Features:**
- Three welcome modes
- Customizable messages
- Particles upon entry
- Title and subtitle upon entry
- Sound upon entry
- Formatting codes
- Variables of PlaceHolderAPI
- Folia support

**Commands:**
- /WelcomeText help **shows you the list of WelcomeText commands**
- /WelcomeText test **shows what the welcome would look like**
- /WelcomeText setlocale **sets the current language of the plugin**
- /WelcomeText version **shows the current version of the plugin**
- /WelcomeText reload **reload plugin configuration**

**Permissions:**
- welcometext.admin **have all plugin permissions**
- welcometext.reload **be able to use the plugin's reload command**
- welcometext.notificationnoplaceholderapi **be able to receive notification that PlaceHolderAPI is not installed on the server**
- welcometext.notificationnewversion **be able to receive a notification if there is an update**
- welcometext.countexcesslimit **be able to receive notification of excess number of particles**
